changelog:
🚀 STABILITY & UI REFRESH (v1.2.5-b174):
🔹 Layout Reversion: Back to the classic, easy-to-use Home Screen design.
🔹 Faster Animations: Morphing transitions between players are now 30% speedier (450ms).
🔹 Smooth Scaling: Micro-animations refined for better tactical feedback.
🔹 Under-the-hood: Optimized smart-autoplay replenishment and recommendation logic.
